onboarding.subtitle: Pan-African community commerce
onboarding.step1Body: GreenFlame connects buyers to local merchants in your neighborhood. Every purchase earns you money. Automatically.
onboarding.step2Body: Every time you shop at a GreenFlame merchant, a portion of your payment comes straight back to your wallet. No complicated points — real money, withdrawable via Mobile Money.
onboarding.step3Body: Everyone you invite to GreenFlame becomes your referral. When they shop — even at a different merchant — you earn a community commission automatically. Across 5 levels.
onboarding.step4Body: Groceries, pharmacies, services, restaurants… Spot GreenFlame merchants by their QR code. Scan, pay, and your cashback is credited within seconds.
onboarding.step1Desc: Scan a merchant's QR code and pay
onboarding.step2Desc: Automatically receive your share on every purchase
onboarding.step3Desc: Share your link and earn on every purchase in your community

hub.title: GreenFlame Hub
hub.heroDesc: Free Standard plan, VIP at 5,000 FCFA/month and sectoral tools — everything GreenFlame offers merchants.
hub.configuringSoon: Products will be available very soon.
hub.standardPerks: 10 products in store|Unlimited invoices & quotes|Advanced analytics|QR payment link|GreenFlame merchant score
hub.vipPerks: Everything in Standard|Shareable public storefront|Multi-cashier (up to 5)|Business management|Products featured 7 days|VIP merchant badge
hub.agentPerks: Become a GreenFlame liquidity point|Deposits and withdrawals for your customers|Permanent activation (one time only)|Float = your shop wallet
hub.salonPerks: Product & cost library|Margin calculation per service|Track your actual costs
hub.couturePerks: Client files with measurements|Order & delivery tracking|Fabric calculator|2D virtual fitting
hub.btpPerks: Material & price library|Site & budget tracking|AI estimator by description|Professional PDF quote
hub.restoPerks: Recipes & margin calculation|Daily menu (draft / published)|Loyal customer management|In-room order taking|Catering quote PDF

landing.heroSubtitle: Every purchase on GreenFlame earns you instant cashback and generates income for your whole community — automatically.
landing.stat1Label: Of shared rewards in your community
landing.howSubtitle: Built so everyone wins — buyers, sellers and their community.
landing.step1Desc: Browse the GreenFlame marketplace and buy from verified merchants in your city.
landing.step2Desc: A portion of the amount comes straight back to your GreenFlame wallet, instantly.
landing.step3Desc: Earnings are automatically shared across 5 generations of your community — without anyone lifting a finger.
landing.feesSubtitle: Each merchant has a code indicating their fee tier. These fees are automatically redistributed to buyers, their community, and the platform.
landing.feesNote: The cashback you earn is always shown clearly on each product page.
landing.buyerSubtitle: You spend, you earn. It's that simple.
landing.buyerFeature2: Dividends on your community's purchases (5 levels)
landing.buyerFeature3: Pay with MTN MoMo, Moov Money & Celtiis
landing.merchantSubtitle: More customers, more loyalty. Zero entry fee.
landing.whySubtitle: Value created on GreenFlame goes back to those who create it. Purchase cashback, community dividends, shared growth — every transaction automatically benefits the whole community.
landing.value1Desc: Free registration. You only pay when you buy. Zero subscription, zero hidden fees.
landing.value2Title: You benefit from your community's activity
landing.value2Desc: Every purchase in your community (up to 5 levels) generates automatic earnings on your account.
landing.value3Desc: Built for Africa. MTN MoMo, Moov Money, Celtiis. Merchants in your city.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the first GreenFlame members in Benin and grow your community right now.
